intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely invalidated by the current visual evidence. P3 (Pothos/Rabbit) and P2/P4 (Mexican Mint/Silver Guest) are missing or have suffered catastrophic structural collapse. P1 (String of Nickels) is present but appears dormant or empty.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Present (Yellow Pot, soil visible, no foliage)
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Systemic Loss (Rabbit anchor present, but host plant Pothos is absent/withered)

plant_audit.P1: Pot contains soil; no visible String of Nickels foliage.
plant_audit.P2: Pot is empty of identifiable Mexican Mint.
plant_audit.P3: White rabbit anchor remains, but the Pothos specimen has vanished or fully decomposed.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Appears dry and undisturbed across all pots.
biome_observations.debris: Presence of crushed eggshells in the black pot (P3/P4 area), likely an attempted calcium intervention.
biome_observations.desk_surface: A small electronic component (IC chip) is present in early images, removed in later images.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t-3: Initial state shows a single green leaf in the black pot and the white rabbit anchor.
temporal_deltas.t-2_to_t-1: Rapid decline; the green leaf in the black pot loses turgidity and disappears.
temporal_deltas.current: Total loss of visible plant life. The biome is currently in a state of 'bare soil' dormancy or total failure.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome has suffered a total systemic collapse. The lack of chlorophyll-bearing tissue suggests either complete desiccation or removal of the specimens. The environment is currently non-viable for the registered species.
anomalies: Presence of electronic component (IC chip) in early frames.
Crushed eggshell debris in the black pot.
Complete disappearance of all plant matter over a 5-day period.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a rapid and total degradation of the botanical collection. Starting from a state where at least one specimen was visible, the biome has transitioned to a state of complete plant absence. The presence of eggshells suggests a failed attempt at soil amendment. The current state is one of total systemic loss.
